description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a dense ring of trees, with a mix of green and purple foliage. The building itself features a flat roof, large glass windows, and a geometric layout with multiple interconnected rectangular sections. The exterior is primarily white and gray, with some wooden accents and paved walkways leading to the entrances. The property includes a manicured lawn, a driveway, and a small garden area, all enclosed within the tree perimeter. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, white and gray exterior, and surrounded by a dense ring of trees and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear view of the geometric building layout within the tree ring.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass windows and the lush tree enclosure, with the garden and lawn visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional windows, and the continuation of the tree perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary entrance, more glass surfaces, and the landscaped surroundings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
